nasb.text: But You have exalted my horn like that of the wild ox; I have been anointed with fresh oil.

esv.text: But you have exalted my horn like that of the wild ox; you have poured over me fresh oil.

cnv.text: 你卻高舉了我的角，像野牛的角； 你用新油膏抹我。

ccb.text: 你使我强壮如野牛， 你用新油浇灌我。

csbs.text: 你高举了我的角，使它如同野牛的角； 你用新油膏抹了我。
